detectors.description:

	- _sellAmount = amount (Dogecoin.sol#1513)

		Dogecoin._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.6.0 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- MissingEscapingInFormatting
	- ArraySliceDynamicallyEncodedBaseType
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- YulOptimizerRedundantAssignmentBreakContinue.
It is used by:
	- ^0.6.0 (Dogecoin.sol#1)
